readings.summary: The Lord judges justly with no favorites.

readings.citation:
Ps 34:2-3, 17-18, 19, 23, R. v.7a
The Lord hears the cry of the poor.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 34:2-3, 17-18, 19, 23, R. v.7a
The Lord hears the cry of the poor.

readings.summary: Paul concludes his writing, is ready for the Day of the Lord.

God was reconciling the world to himself in Christ,
and entrusting to us the message of salvation.
Those who humble themselves will be exalted.

antiphons.text:
Let the hearts that seek the Lord rejoice;
turn to the Lord and his strength; constantly seek his face.

We will ring out our joy at your saving help
and exult in the name of our God.

Christ loved us and gave himself up for us,
as a fragrant offering to God.
